---
name: Compatibility issue
about: Report conflicts or issues between Ultimate Backport Mod and other mods
title: "[COMPA]"
labels: Compatibility
assignees: ''

---

## 🛠️ Description
Describe the compatibility issue with UBM and other mods.  
- Which other mod(s) are involved?  
- What is the expected behavior?  
- What actually happens?  

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. List all mods installed (include versions).  
2. Describe the environment (Minecraft + Forge version).  
3. Detail the actions that lead to the issue.  
4. Include screenshots, crash logs, or error messages if available.

## ✅ Expected Behavior
Describe how UBM should behave when used alongside the other mod(s).

## 💥 Actual Behavior
Describe what actually happens, including crashes, missing features, or visual glitches.

## 🪵 Logs / Crash Reports
Provide logs in a code block (```) or link to [Pastebin](https://pastebin.com) / [Gist](https://gist.github.com).

## ✔️ Checklist
- [ ] I am using the **latest UBM release**.  
- [ ] I have checked for known compatibility issues in existing issues.  
- [ ] I have included all relevant logs, screenshots, and mod versions.
